prompt: A bold square fast-food advertisement poster in a clean studio setup, designed like a premium KFC campaign. The composition is perfectly centered with a white background panel in the middle and solid bright red vertical side panels on both the left and right. At the very top, place 3 short red vertical stripes spaced evenly across the upper margin, referencing the KFC brand motif. Under them, add a large stacked headline in heavy bold sans-serif uppercase text: “THIS IS NOT A FILTER.” in black, followed directly below by “IT’S JUST KFC.” in bright red. In the center foreground, show a young man with short dark curly hair wearing a dark red crew-neck shirt, leaning forward behind a large bucket of fried chicken as if smelling the food; only his hair, ears, shoulders, and upper torso are visible, and his face is obscured by a rectangular blur block. The bucket is oversized and centered on a white tabletop, filled with 6 visible pieces of golden crispy fried chicken with textured crunchy breading, with light steam rising from the chicken. The bucket is white with red side panels and a black KFC-style logo on the front, with the face area obscured by a metallic gray blur block. On the left side of the table, place 1 red-and-white striped fries carton filled with golden French fries, with a few extra fries scattered on the tabletop in front; the carton also has the KFC-style logo with its face area obscured. On the right side, place 1 tall transparent glass of dark cola packed with ice, condensation visible on the outside, branded with the KFC-style logo with the face area obscured. In front of the drink, place 1 small white dipping bowl filled with glossy red ketchup. At the bottom center, add the tagline in bold black sans-serif: “Crispy. Juicy. Irresistible.” and beneath it a small cursive signature-style line reading “Col. Harland Sanders.” with a small rectangular red accent below. Use highly polished commercial food photography lighting, vivid red-white-black brand colors, sharp focus on the food, realistic textures, symmetrical layout, premium poster ad styling, and a clean modern social-media-ready square format.
